title: jasminum × stephanense
intro: Jasminum × stephanense, also known as Stephan's jasmine or star jasmine, is a hybrid plant species in the family Oleaceae. This plant is known for its fragrant white flowers and is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum × stephanense include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make various remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
